message:
fix(http): minor fixes for H1/H2 and scope

Small fixes across HTTP and context modules:

http/h1/stream.rs:
- Import fix for new channel-based body types

http/h2/connection.rs:
- Improve PUSH_PROMISE validation logging
- Better error context for frame processing

cx/scope.rs:
- Minor documentation fix

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
